syncedVersion: TODO(setup): template semver this repo last synced to (e.g. 1.0.0)
syncedCommit: TODO(setup): set to the template HEAD sha this repo was instantiated/last synced from
syncedAt: TODO(setup): ISO date of that sync
_comment: Template-subscription anchor. A sweep diffs template HEAD against syncedCommit and files a migration issue when structural deltas appear. After applying a migration plan, update syncedCommit+syncedAt in the same PR. skipPaths lists template paths this repo deliberately diverges from (each entry should cite an ADR or CHANGELOG 'Unchanged (intentional)' line). syncedVersion is the semantic anchor: the drift sweep files MAJOR bumps as P1 must-migrate, MINOR as P2 should-adopt, and stays SILENT on patch-only drift.
